title: The ability to bundle automations in a folder

posts.author: MJacobson (Michael Jacobson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’d like the ability to bundle automations together using a folder system. On boards with many automations, it can become difficult to find specific automations.

This would be particularly helpful where multiple automations are required to complete an action or when attempting to redeploy this set of automations on other boards.

With growing team, it can be difficult to ensure that everyones workspace is functioning correctly when we need to add each automation one by one, even when using the template system;
